posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When managing budgets, we need a native function to perform calculations based on Number widgets on dashboards. This would allow us to calculate from other number widgets and display the result in a new widget.

What are you trying to achieve

I’m trying to show a result of a calculation from other number widgets. Let’s say I have an “Income” widget showing all the items on the group Income, the same for “Expenses” and then I want another widget that subtract the expenses from the income and show the result.
